### 2. State 변수 추가 (line 17)


### 3. 메뉴 버튼 onPressed 구현 (line 94-98)

```dart
  setState(() {
    _isListView = !_isListView;
  });
},
```

### 4. body 조건부 렌더링 (line 112-130)

```dart
if (_isListView)
  Center(child: HistoryListView(currentMonth: _currentMonth, mockData: _mockData))
else
  Center(child: SizedBox(width: 343.w, child: Column(...)))
```
